component_identification.content: Merchant bags, goods cards (legal and contraband), player stands/market stalls, coin tokens, sheriff marker, and penalty reference values. Legal goods have low profit and low fines; contraband has high profit but risky penalties.

core_game_loop.content: Each round, players draw cards, load goods into their bag, and declare a legal good type/quantity to the Sheriff. The Sheriff may inspect bags or let them pass. Inspected lies pay penalties; wrongful inspections pay compensation. After several rounds with rotating Sheriff, players score goods and bonuses.

detailed_rules.content: Non-sheriff players choose cards from hand, place up to bag limit, then truthfully or falsely declare only one legal good type and count. Open table talk, bribery, and promises are allowed within agreed rule set/edition. Sheriff decides per player to inspect or waive. If inspecting and merchant lied, illegal goods are confiscated and merchant pays listed fine. If merchant was truthful, Sheriff pays that fine amount to merchant. Uninspected goods go to merchant stand for endgame scoring. Legal goods score face value plus King/Queen bonuses for most and second-most of each legal type. Contraband scores only face value (unless expansion rules add variants). Sheriff role rotates so everyone has equal turns enforcing.

scoring_and_endgame.content: After final sheriff round, total coin on hand plus value of goods in stand, then apply legal-goods majority bonuses. Highest total wins. Ties usually break by total legal goods then contraband value per edition rules.

beginner_strategy.content: As merchant, mix honest and dishonest rounds so your pattern is harder to read. Small believable lies often outperform huge obvious contraband stacks. As Sheriff, inspect selectively where expected value is best; constant inspecting can bankrupt you on false calls. Track who still needs big scores and pressure them. Negotiate creatively, but honor table comfort limits about deal-making style.

metadata.notes: Check 4 failed: total_token_count is 369; must be 800-3000 (hard reject if <800 or >5000)
